text: Planning a trip is always an exciting part of travel. Last year, I spent weeks researching destinations and booking flights for a two-week journey to Japan. When I finally arrived, I was amazed by the new cultures around me. The food was incredible—from fresh sushi to steaming bowls of ramen, every meal felt like an adventure. However, language barriers were a challenge; I often used hand gestures and a translation app to communicate. Despite the difficulties, these moments became special memories. Looking back, the kindness of strangers and the taste of unfamiliar dishes taught me more than any guidebook could.
